title: SurgBox Advanced AI-Powered Surgical Procedure Analysis and Assistance Tool
author: Umair Masood Awan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: SurgBox is an innovative AI-driven platform designed to enhance surgical precision, efficiency, and outcomes through real-time procedural analysis and intelligent assistance. Leveraging cutting-edge computer vision, machine learning, SurgBox provides surgeons with actionable insights, step-by-step guidance, and predictive analytics during operations. The system analyzes live surgical footage, identifies critical anatomical structures, monitors instrument usage, and alerts surgeons to potential risks or deviations from best practices. By integrating seamlessly with existing surgical workflows, SurgBox aims to reduce errors, improve decision-making, and elevate the standard of care in both open and minimally invasive surgeries. This paper outlines the architecture, key functionalities, and clinical benefits of SurgBox, demonstrating its potential to revolutionize modern surgical practice.
